channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Fatal police shooting of man with knife roils Madison, Wisconsin
item.description: The police shooting death of a man with a knife has roiled Wisconsin’s capital city and prompted the governor to call for transparency and accountability in any investigation.

item.title: US on track to have historically low number of homicides in 2026, report says
More than 24 states sue Trump administration after it put conditions on receiving disaster funding
